---
id: create-o-auth-2-client
title: "Create OAuth 2.0 Client"
description: "Create a new OAuth 2.0 client. If you pass `client_secret` the secret is used, otherwise a random secret"
sidebar_label: "Create OAuth 2.0 Client"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create OAuth 2.0 Client"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/admin/clients"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new OAuth 2.0 client. If you pass `client_secret` the secret is used, otherwise a random secret
is generated. The secret is echoed in the response. It is not possible to retrieve it later on.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
